| Field | Value |
|---|---|

## 1. Unit Test Plan

**Framework**: Vitest 2.1.9 + @testing-library/react 16.1.0 (frontend); JUnit 5 (backend)

| Test ID | Story | Description | Expected Result |
|---|---|---|---|
| UT-001 | US-002 / PURELY-17 | Initial cart state has safe numeric defaults | subtotal=0, noOfCartItems=0, cartItems=[] |
| UT-002 | US-002 / PURELY-17 | parseFloat with \|\| 0 guard for falsy inputs | Returns "0.00" for undefined, null, 0, "", false |
| UT-003 | US-002 / PURELY-17 | Error handler resets cart to safe defaults | State: { cartItems: [], subtotal: 0, noOfCartItems: 0 } |
| UT-004 | US-002 / PURELY-17 | No-token user gets safe defaults | Early return, safe state, no API call |
| UT-005 | US-003 / PURELY-18 | Cart renders "0.00" when amount undefined | No NaN in DOM |
| UT-006 | US-003 / PURELY-18 | Cart renders "0.00" when amount null | No NaN in DOM |
| UT-007 | US-003 / PURELY-18 | Cart renders correct valid amount | "50.00" displayed |
| UT-008 | US-003 / PURELY-18 | Cart renders info when no items | "No items in your cart!" message |
| UT-009 | US-005 / PURELY-20 | Cart sets placeholder on image error | src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE, data-fallback = "true" |
| UT-010 | US-005 / PURELY-20 | Cart loop guard prevents infinite fallback | Second error does not change src |
| UT-011 | US-004 / PURELY-19 | Checkout renders "0.00" when amount undefined | No NaN in DOM |
| UT-012 | US-004 / PURELY-19 | Checkout renders "0.00" when amount null | No NaN in DOM |
| UT-013 | US-004 / PURELY-19 | Checkout renders correct valid amount | "50.00" displayed |
| UT-014 | US-004 / PURELY-19 | Checkout renders "0.00" subtotal for empty cart | "0.00" displayed |
| UT-015 | US-006 / PURELY-21 | Checkout sets placeholder on image error | src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE |
| UT-016 | US-006 / PURELY-21 | Checkout loop guard prevents double fallback | Guard works |
| UT-017 | US-007 / PURELY-22 | Products renders images with correct src | Original URLs preserved |
| UT-018 | US-007 / PURELY-22 | Products sets placeholder on broken image | src = PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE |
| UT-019 | US-007 / PURELY-22 | Products loop guard prevents infinite fallback | Guard works |
| UT-020 | US-007 / PURELY-22 | Products good image unaffected | No data-fallback attribute |
| UT-021 | US-007 / PURELY-22 | Placeholder constant is valid SVG data URI | Matches data:image/svg+xml pattern |
| UT-022 | US-007 / PURELY-22 | Real Products component smoke test (CR-001) | Real component renders img with working onError |
| UT-023 | US-001 / PURELY-16 | MongoDB URI points to purely_auth_service | YAML contains correct DB name |
| UT-024 | US-001 / PURELY-16 | MongoDB URI is valid connection string | Starts with mongodb:// |

## 2. Functional Test Plan

**Scope**: Acceptance criteria validation, integration tests, regression tests.

| Test ID | Story | Acceptance Criterion | Expected Result |
|---|---|---|---|
| FT-001 | US-001 / PURELY-16 | User registered via auth → cart API validates user | 200/201 status |
| FT-002 | US-001 / PURELY-16 | user-service connects to purely_auth_service DB | Config verified |
| FT-003 | US-002 / PURELY-17 | Cart rendered first time → subtotal=0, cartItems=[] | No NaN |
| FT-004 | US-002 / PURELY-17 | Cart API fails → fallback state | subtotal=0, cartItems=[] |
| FT-005 | US-003 / PURELY-18 | Valid amount → correct display | "12.99" |
| FT-006 | US-003 / PURELY-18 | Undefined/null amount → "0.00" | No NaN |
| FT-007 | US-003 / PURELY-18 | Undefined subtotal → "0.00" | No NaN |
| FT-008 | US-004 / PURELY-19 | Checkout valid amount | "24.50" |
| FT-009 | US-004 / PURELY-19 | Checkout undefined amount → "0.00" | No NaN |
| FT-010 | US-004 / PURELY-19 | Checkout undefined subtotal → "0.00" | No NaN |
| FT-011 | US-005 / PURELY-20 | Cart broken image → placeholder | PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE displayed |
| FT-012 | US-005 / PURELY-20 | Cart good image → original | No fallback trigger |
| FT-013 | US-005 / PURELY-20 | Cart placeholder fails → no loop | onError fires once |
| FT-014 | US-006 / PURELY-21 | Checkout broken image → placeholder | PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE displayed |
| FT-015 | US-006 / PURELY-21 | Checkout loop guard | No re-trigger |
| FT-016 | US-007 / PURELY-22 | Products broken image → placeholder | PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE displayed |
| FT-017 | US-007 / PURELY-22 | Products loop guard | No re-trigger |

### Integration Tests

| Test ID | Components | Description |
|---|---|---|
| IT-001 | user-service → MongoDB | URI points to purely_auth_service |
| IT-002 | cart.service → CartContext → Cart | Safe defaults flow through context |
| IT-003 | cart.service → CartContext → Checkout | Safe subtotal propagates |
| IT-004 | Products → ProductService → UI | Products render with image fallback |
| IT-005 | Browser img → onError → DOM | Fallback lifecycle in jsdom |

### Regression Tests

| Test ID | Scope | Description |
|---|---|---|
| RG-001 | Cart drawer | Open/close still works |
| RG-002 | Cart quantity | +/- buttons functional |
| RG-003 | Cart delete | Remove item works |
| RG-004 | Checkout form | Form validation intact |
| RG-005 | Products grid | Product cards render correctly |
| RG-006 | Cart context | Context provider/consumer chain intact |

## 3. Security Test Plan

**Scope**: OWASP Top 10 mapped to bug-fix blast radius.

| Test ID | OWASP | Test Name | Focus |
|---|---|---|---|
| SEC-001 | A01 | Cart API ownership validation | Access control on cart endpoints |
| SEC-002 | A02 | Auth token plaintext localStorage | Token storage security |
| SEC-003 | A03 | Placeholder image SVG XSS check | Data URI safety |
| SEC-004 | A03 | onError handler XSS injection | DOM manipulation safety |
| SEC-005 | A03 | parseFloat input safety | Prototype pollution / injection |
| SEC-006 | A04 | Cart quantity bounds enforcement | Server-side validation |
| SEC-007 | A05 | MongoDB unauthenticated connection | Config security |
| SEC-008 | A07 | Auth header token format | Standard compliance |
| SEC-009 | A09 | Cart error logging telemetry | Error visibility |

---

## 4. Compliance Test Plan

**Scope**: License, data protection, accessibility.

| Test ID | Framework | Check |
|---|---|---|
| CMP-001–009 | License | All runtime dependencies MIT-compatible with Apache-2.0 |
| CMP-010–012 | License | NFR-003 — no new dependencies introduced |
| CMP-013–018 | Data Protection | No new PII, token handling, error state data |
| CMP-019–024 | Accessibility | Image alt text, placeholder content, form labels |
